label: 第173話
source_locator: 単行本20巻 目次 p.27
summary_short: 伏黒は玉犬でレジィを仕留め、死の間際に得点と「運命に翻弄されて死ね」という言葉を受け取る。髙羽と黄櫨の戦いは中断し、来栖華が伏黒の前へ現れる。
summary_full: 伏黒は死角から玉犬「渾」を放ち、レジィへ致命傷を与える。敗北を認めたレジィは、自分の得点を伏黒へ譲り、「運命に翻弄されて死ね」と言い残して死亡する。総則追加の告知とレジィの死を知った黄櫨は髙羽との戦いをやめ、麗美も伏黒のもとから去る。疲労で倒れた伏黒の上空には、天使と共存する来栖華が現れる。同時に仙台結界では乙骨が四つ巴の一角を倒していた。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 恵 comes out on top in his fight against レジィ . While 高羽 and 黄櫨折 finish up their own battle, 恵 receives a visit after concluding his business in the 東京第1結界 . Meanwhile, in the 仙台結界, the 死滅回游 has grown even more vicious.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: レジィ uses his last moments to give 恵 his points. レジィ lays bleeding out on the ground looking up at 恵, the man who beasted him. He realizes that the domain and the pool concealed that 恵 could still strike with 玉犬: 渾 . 恵 didn't flee into the gym using 鵺 , he lured レジィ inside. The sorcerer from the past is embarrassed to have been outsmarted by a much younger modern-day sorcerer. 恵 explains that 鵺 can't carry people for long and he's had trouble with that before when 鵺 took 悠仁 and 猪野 up 渋谷 C Tower . 恵 inquires as to what レジィ's relationship to 天元様 is. There isn't much of a relationship, as it takes レジィ a moment to even remember who 天元 is. He only knows that the hermit is immortal and isn't surprised to find out he's still alive in this time. レジィ claims that Tenge's explanation for the 死滅回游 is a bluff. 恵 has to consider that 天元 could secretly be in league with 羂索 , but still finds this highly unlikely. 黄櫨折 is unable to deal any significant damage to 高羽. Defeated with dignity, レジィ tells his コガネ to transfer all 41 of his points to 恵. The benefactor isn't so pleased but レジィ tells him to just consider it a good dead before death. He adds that he's just a spectator and isn't close with 羂索 at all. With his final words, レジィ tells his executioner to let fate toy with him before dying like a fool. With レジィ's death moments later, 恵 receives five points from his コガネ. A massive explosion is set off on the roof of another building elsewhere in the city. It was caused by 黄櫨折, who's still fighting with 高羽 and wonders if he's finally hit his target. The comedian appears beside Haznoki and tells him he missed while still comically encouraging him to stay focused because his opponent is tough. Continuously irritated by 高羽's antics, 黄櫨折 tries to punch him only for his fist to slide off. For some reason, 高羽 is covered in ankake sauce, further annoying his adversary. 黄櫨折 is frustrated by this fight because he doesn't understand why 高羽 won't take damage regardless of how many times he gets bombed. 天使 descends upon 恵. コガネ interrupts the battle to inform 黄櫨折 that レジィ・スター has been eliminated. Surprised, 黄櫨折 decides to walk away from the fight entirely. He says he's going home because he's had enough, Initially, 高羽 is fine with this and replies with a comedic reminder to bathe. Then 高羽 remembers what 恵 asked him to do and tries to pester 黄櫨折 for his points, only to be repeatedly denied. 高羽史彦's innate 術式 is 超人. Anything he's certain will be funny becomes reality. It's a 術式 with the potential to even oppose 五条悟, but 高羽 is utterly unaware of it. Elsewhere, 麗美 runs through the streets in a panic. She's distressed because she's uncomfortable with adversity and being an adult. She's always been told men are supposed to be wolves but they've always taken care of her. She doesn't know how to go on and still thinks wolves will continue to help her until she's cornered by an actual deadly hound, 玉犬: 渾. However, before 恵 can make good on his threats, 津美紀 's voice tells her brother to stop before he kills someone in cold blood. 玉犬 disappears and 麗美 is surprised she's being let go. Annoyed and exhausted, 恵 tells his sister to shut up before he collapses to the ground unconscious. Just as this happens, none other than the 天使, 来栖華 , descends upon his body. In the 仙台結界, the jujutsu battles have far surpassed that of the 東京 Colonies in terms of pure viciousness. There are four powerhouses at the center of the conflict that has reached a deadlock inside the colony. " Ultimately... one did fall. " ドゥルヴ Lakdawalla is a veteran of the Civil War of Wa in his second incarnation. He has 91 points and two kinds of 式神 that can constitute a domain with their orbiting trajectories. 石流龍 has 77 points and the highest 呪力 output of all the players in the 死滅回游. 烏鷺亨子 is the former Captain of the Sun, Moon, and Stars Squad directly affiliated with the Fujiwara clan, also known as the Toh. She has 70 points and the power to manipulate the sky. 黒沐死 is a special grade cockroach 呪霊 that 羂索 released from 呪霊操術 . It has 54 points and is lying dormant until unfavorable conditions disappear. Due to their conflicting abilities and natures, the four powerhouses forced a standoff rather than an alliance. However, the deadlock falls apart when one side eventually collapses. ドゥルヴ Lakdawalla is cut down by 東京 呪術高専 second-year student, 乙骨憂太 , who now has 35 points. He reclaimed his special grade rank three months after the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons and possesses unusual strength second only to 五条悟 .

key_events_verified_phase9: 伏黒が玉犬でレジィへ致命傷を与える
レジィが得点を伏黒へ譲渡して死亡する
黄櫨と髙羽の戦闘が終了する
来栖華が倒れた伏黒を発見する
乙骨が仙台結界でドゥルヴを倒す
verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
